name: persona-os
description: Persona OS by The Product Channel — drop-in operating systems for knowledge workers. Each persona ships a complete kit of Claude skills, a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system, and automations. Start with Product Manager OS.

plugins.name: product-manager-os
plugins.description: A complete operating system for product managers: 18 skills across discovery, strategy, execution, and launch (interviews, research synthesis, personas, opportunity trees, prioritization, OKRs, specs, user stories, roadmaps, sprints, positioning, competitive briefs, launch plans, metrics, stakeholder updates, meeting notes, and more), a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system that learns your product and team, and ready-to-wire automations.
